channel.title: Abouts on Happy Birthday Uchu
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on Happy Birthday Uchu

item.title: About MSK
item.description:
🌱 Introduction

Hi! I’m Mohammed Swalah (MSK), a computer science student and plant enthusiast from Kerala, India. I combine my passion for technology with sustainable gardening to create digital solutions that promote environmental awareness.

Academic Journey 🎓

Education

  • High School: GHSS Thanniyam (2021–2023)
  • Diploma: Hospitality Management (Front Office Operations), Food Craft Institute, Thrissur (2023–2024)
  • Current Pursuit: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA), IGNOU (2024–Ongoing)

Vision

My multidisciplinary background—from hospitality to computer science—fuels my belief in versatile problem-solving. I’m driven to leverage technology for sustainable, community-focused solutions.
